description: Minimal IPC surface for the hidden headless-render windows created by render_url_headless (src-tauri/src/web_fetch.rs). These windows navigate to arbitrary, agent-supplied http/https URLs, so remote (untrusted, third-party) page content runs in them — this capability intentionally grants that remote content nothing beyond emitting one namespaced completion event back to Rust, on windows matching the render-window label pattern only. It must never be broadened to core:default or to the main window.
